pageNotFoundDescription: Sorry, the page you visited does not exist
noProvidersDescription: Unable to connect to model data server and no local cache available.
noProvidersHint: Please check your network connection and try again.
initializationFailedDescription: An error occurred during application initialization and cannot continue.
resetAllData: Reset All Data and Start Over
resetConfirmDescription: This will clear all saved model configurations and chat records, and generate a new encryption key. This action cannot be undone.
masterKeyRegeneratedMessage: The encryption key has been regenerated. Previously saved API keys cannot be decrypted. If you have a backup key, please import it first. Do not modify model configurations before importing, otherwise encrypted data will be unrecoverable.
decryptionFailureMessage: {{count}} model(s) have API keys that cannot be decrypted. Please import the correct encryption key to recover.

keyRecovery.title: Import Key
keyRecovery.description: Enter your backup key to recover encrypted data
keyRecovery.securityWarning: The key is sensitive, do not enter it when others can see
keyRecovery.mismatchWarning: The imported key cannot decrypt existing data. Please verify the key is correct
keyRecovery.importFailed: Key import failed, please try again
